name: Vegie Garden Loaf
recipeIngredient: 1/4 tsp Each salt, pepper and sage
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees F.
2. In a small skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat. Sauté onion for about 5 minutes until translucent.
3. In a large bowl, combine zucchini, carrots, broccoli, oatmeal, crumbled bread, oat bran, and cheese.
4. In a separate bowl, whisk together tomato sauce, egg, egg white, seasonings (salt, pepper, sage), dried thyme, chopped parsley, and Parmesan cheese until well mixed.
5. Pour the wet mixture into the dry ingredients in another bowl. Stir thoroughly to combine all ingredients evenly.
6. Spoon the batter into a greased 9x5-inch loaf pan.
7. Bake for 30 to 35 minutes or until firm. Allow to stand for 15 minutes before slicing.
